div.head: The Minister in Honduras (Erwin) to the Secretary of State
div.p: Sir: I have the honor to refer to the Department’s circular airgrams of January 19, 1943, 8:00 p.m.,Ante, p. 106. January 30, 1943, 3:10 p.m., and February 19, 1943, 7:50 p.m.,Neither printed. and to report that Decentralization Plan AFor an outline of the plan, see circular airgram of January 19, 8 p.m., p. 106. is to become effective in Honduras April 1, 1943.

This Legation has just been informed that the Department has suggested that Plan A be not started in El Salvador until April 1, in
lieu of the original starting date of March 1, in order that there be opportunity to accumulate and forward needed data.

The Legation requests an instruction as to whether the starting date of April 1 in Honduras is approved by the Department or whether some later date should be selected.This date appeared to be satisfactory.
